text.jpText:
へへ。実はさ、今500円玉貯金してんだ。
いつかバイク買いてーの。
text.enText:
Hehe, I've started collecting five-hundred— 
yen coins. I'm saving up for a motorcycle.

text.jpText:
でも、どれ買うかまだ絞れてねーんだよ。
全部カッコよくてさぁ。
text.enText:
Still don't know which one I want though. 
They're all so damn cool.

text.jpText:
やっぱアメリカンかなぁー。でも
リッターSSでカッ飛ばすのもシブいよなぁ。
text.enText:
Something American would be sweet as hell, 
but soaring down the roads in a 1 000cc 
supersport sounds great too.

text.jpText:
くぅ～～、楽しみだぜ！
買ったら後ろに乗せてやるよ！
text.enText:
Hnnngh, I can't wait! I'll take you 
for a ride when I finally get one!
